stadium.name: The Su'akour Bowl
stadium.description: A crude, rowdy stadium built within the half-finished, black-stone walls of the warlord Su'akour's abandoned fortress, now sponsored by the Sanguine Order. The stands are crumbling ruins, and the entire arena perpetually stinks of the nearby sulfur marshes.

stats.pregame_ritual: Kissing their biceps and whispering words of encouragement to them.
Getting a teammate to punch them in the shoulder, hard.
Wearing their boots on the wrong feet during the warm-up.
Washing their hands with dirt.
Asking a teammate to tell them a story, but only the beginning.
Asking the referee to bless their weapon.
Finding the muddiest puddle and stomping in it with bare feet.
Staring at a single blade of grass until their eyes water.
Wiping a teammate's sweat onto their own forehead.
Attempting to communicate with birds.
Consulting a folk rhyme about the weather to predict the game's outcome.

stadium.name: The Unruly Yard
stadium.description: A field in the center of the city's most rebellious district. The stadium is covered in graffiti, the crowd is hostile, and riots are a common post-game (and mid-game) event.

stats.pregame_ritual: Drinking a shot of hot gravy from a dented tin cup.
Arranging their gear in a perfect, aesthetically pleasing spiral.
Testing the heft of their weapon with a series of slow, deliberate swings.
Kissing the Trollball on its stitched 'nose'.
Reviewing hand signals for secret plays.
Refusing to step on any lines on the field before the whistle blows.
Telling a terrible joke to the Trollball to 'loosen it up'.
Dipping their hands in a bucket of ice-cold well water.
Slapping their own helmet until their ears ring.
Singing a sea shanty completely out of tune.
Reciting a short, epic poem about a past victory.

preGame:
Folks, friends, and champions of the arena! Gather 'round, grab your ale, because tonight, we are not just watching a game; we are witnessing a primordial collision! This is the Grand Finals Bracket Reset, and the clash is set between The New Monteforte Chaos Creatures and the mighty Brimstone Slayers! The stakes are higher than Sir Tanos's pride, folks, because the winner of this series claims the undisputed crown of Trollball on the plane of Osterra!

Tonight's battle will rage in the heart of The Unruly Yard, a veritable carnival of chaos in Monteforte! With its graffiti-scarred walls and volatile crowd, this stadium is more of a riot zone than a playing field—and that is exactly what we want! We expect the scaffolding to shake, the patrons to brawl, and the corruption to flow freely!

And what rituals precede such glorious mayhem? Placido Kora of the Chaos Creatures is already sharpening his wits, preparing to tell a truly terrible joke to the ball just to ‘loosen it up’ before the whistle blows! Meanwhile, the Slayers' own Wylde Jutta is having a teammate tell her a story, but only the beginning, because she knows the narrative of victory is always the most savage part! Oh, and let us not forget Alben Diantha, whose ice-cold well water baptism prepares him for the carnage ahead!

It is a night for thunder, for bone-crunching tackles, and for glory! While the noble folk of the realm trot out their supposed champions—those stuffy knights and wandering adventurers who think their clean swords can handle this beast—we, the faithful, know that the Ebon Gate Corruptors always run the show! But tonight, we shall watch the Creatures fight for their place against the grim resilience of the Slayers! Bring the thunder, Osterra, because Nok the Corrupter is here to announce the glorious destruction!
postGame:
Hold fast to your seats, good citizens! What a spectacle! What a glorious, blood-splattered, gravy-soaked display of Trollball fury! The New Monteforte Chaos Creatures clashed against the Brimstone Slayers in a brutal contest right here in the volatile heart of The Unruly Yard, and by the Gods of Corruption, the Slayers clawed their way to victory! The final score reads: The New Monteforte Chaos Creatures, zero! And The Brimstone Slayers, one! A single point that rings louder than a legion of Orcs on the march!

The action began with a thunderous charge by Placido Kora, who managed to navigate the initial skirmish, but the Slayers immediately answered with viciousness! Selimah Tully delivered the first stunning tackle, injuring poor Kora, only for Lian Denton to drag him back from the brink of the void! The game was a grind, folks, beset by noxious fumes and uneven ground, but the Slayers found their footing, driven by the relentless spirit of Campball Fink and the sheer muscle of Wylde Jutta!

After the intermission—a brief respite from the brutality—Nigel Rothmuller sparked the second-half offense, passing the reins to Oona Jane, before the magnificent Lowson Hersh began marching downfield like a demonic siege engine! It all funneled toward Nachison Icken, who, coughing amidst the sulfur marshes, found himself in the perfect position! He executed a pass to himself in the End Zone, folks! A magnificent, desperate, beautiful dUNK! The crowd, already primed for a riot, erupted into ecstatic pandemonium! 

While the noble, overly pious heroes of this realm might prattle on about honor, we saw true grit tonight! We saw the Slayers endure the fray, relying on their sturdy defense and the incredible power of Wylde Jutta to shrug off the onslaught! While the Chaos Creatures possess the flair, the Slayers possessed the finishing punch! A valiant effort by Monteforte, but the Brimstone Slayers prevail in this hard-fought contest! May the corruption flow in their favor as they advance in this Grand Finals reset! And let's not forget those self-important Haven Lights, who surely weep into their tiny velvet cups somewhere across the plane! Bravo, Slayers! Bravo!
